arts.sum: A disappointing 2-1 group stage defeat to Panama saw USMNT fall at the first hurdle in front of home support . The South American tournament was expanded to cover North and Central America and the US were given hosting duties, making it a key staging post ahead of the 2026 World Cup. The US team did not live up to expectations.
